labels.description: runs preconfigured benchamarks and spits out timing
labels.name: benchmark performance

title: Use vertical spacing reciprocal in implicit solver

body:
This PR adds the possibility of having dynamical particles. 
To do so, we just need to provide an interface function that spits out the velocity of the particle. 
If we do so, we can have particles with a drag and a proper velocity, like what we did with @plazzari [here](https://github.com/plazzari/ParticleChaos.jl/blob/main/dynamical_particles.jl)
title: Adding the possibility of having dynamical particles
